response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrated initiative in open-source and agentic tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams of 30+, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Built agentic infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver, showing relevant AI-agent exposure
Proven experience with event-driven systems, microservices, and real-time data handling
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse engineering contexts
concerns: No demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of architecting production multi-agent frameworks with feedback loops for financial decisioning
